programs.title: Classic Coronation Street
programs.desc: Tony's offer prompts Rita to begin exploring retirement options. The Peacocks realise they've outstayed their welcome at the Websters', and Jason has a heart-to-heart with Becky.

programs.title: Inspector Morse
programs.desc: First-ever episode of the drama series. Inspector Morse teams up with future partner Sergeant Lewis to investigate the case of a woman found dead at her home.

programs.title: Heartbeat
programs.desc: Police drama series. Nick's job intrudes on his social life when news of an antiques theft interrupts a date, and Greengrass's nephew turns up with a proposition.

programs.title: Heartbeat
programs.desc: Drama series. The police are baffled by a campaign of threats against a local shopkeeper. Gina's new boyfriend is hired as pub chef.

programs.title: Midsomer Murders
programs.desc: Barnaby investigates an explosion at a haulage yard. When a body turns up, there are plenty of suspects, including a grieving mother and a group of TA soldiers.

programs.title: Classic Emmerdale
programs.desc: Doug awaits Hilary's arrival at Arthur's party. Carl and Anna are caught up in a bidding war over Mill Cottage.
